Don’t go food shopping. Starve. Die. Be a man.
If you can’t find what you’re looking for in the store, don’t ask for help. Just walk out. Be a man.
Don’t use a plate. Always eat over the sink. Be a man.
When your wife tells you to get in touch with your emotions, punch a hole in the wall. Be a man.
Never wear sandals. Real men hide their emotions and their feet. Be a man.
Build a shed in the backyard to get away from your family and never go back in the house. Be a man.
Hate your job? Do it for the rest of your life. Be a man.
Never learn from your mistakes. Be a man.
Always frown. It builds character. Be a man.
Don’t take golf lessons. Just throw your clubs in the pond. Be a man.
Don’t have hobbies. Just water the driveway. Be a man.
Never take pictures of your family. Be a man.
Eat most of the pizza then smash the box. Be a man.
Never sit when you pee. Stand there like a statue. Be a man.
If it’s raining, don’t bring an umbrella. Get soaked. Be a man.
Your wife is mad? Ignore her until she forgets. Be a man.
Never ask for directions. Get lost for hours. Be a man.
Don’t go to the doctor. Tough it out until you die. Be a man.
When someone asks how you’re doing, say 'fine' even if you’re dying inside. Be a man.
Never say sorry. It makes you look weak. Be a man.
If you break something, just hide it and blame someone else. Be a man.
Don’t help with the dishes. That’s women’s work. Be a man.
Never change a diaper. Pretend you don’t know how. Be a man.
If your kid is crying, tell him to toughen up. Be a man.
Don’t go to therapy. Just drink more. Be a man.
Always leave the toilet seat up. It’s a power move. Be a man.
Never listen to your wife’s advice. You already know everything. Be a man.
If you’re lost, just keep driving in circles. Be a man.
Don’t buy flowers. They die anyway. Be a man.
When your boss yells at you, just stare blankly. Be a man.
Never admit you’re wrong. Double down harder. Be a man.
If the car breaks down, kick it. That usually fixes it. Be a man.
Don’t read instructions. Figure it out or break it. Be a man.
Never wear sunscreen. Real men get skin cancer. Be a man.
If someone cuts you off in traffic, follow them home. Be a man.
Don’t wash your hands after using the bathroom. Germs build immunity. Be a man.
Always talk over people. Your opinion is the only one that matters. Be a man.
Never hug your kids. Handshakes only. Be a man.
If you’re cold, just suffer in silence. Be a man.
Don’t call your mom. She’ll just worry. Be a man.
When you get a gift you don’t like, throw it away in front of them. Be a man.
Never dance. Even at your own wedding. Be a man.
If the lawn needs mowing, complain about it for three weeks first. Be a man.
Don’t hold the door for anyone. They can do it themselves. Be a man.
Always finish the last beer in the fridge. It’s your right. Be a man.
Never say 'I love you' first. Make them work for it. Be a man.
If you’re sick, go to work anyway and spread it. Be a man.
Don’t use GPS. Drive around until you find it or give up. Be a man.
When your wife asks what’s wrong, say 'nothing' and storm off. Be a man.
Never share your food. Especially fries. Be a man.
If someone bumps into you, push them back harder. Be a man.
Don’t clean the house. It’ll just get dirty again. Be a man.
Always park in the handicap spot if no one’s looking. Be a man.
Never cry at movies. Even if it’s sad. Be a man.
If you lose at something, say the game was rigged. Be a man.
Don’t help carry groceries. Your back hurts from all that lifting you don’t do. Be a man.
Always mansplain. Even when you have no idea what you’re talking about. Be a man.
Never put the toilet paper on the roll. Just leave it on the counter. Be a man.
If you forget an anniversary, act surprised it even exists. Be a man.
Don’t go to the gym. Just talk about going to the gym. Be a man.
When someone tells a joke, don’t laugh. Just stare. Be a man.
Never use an umbrella. Real men get wet. Be a man.
If your phone dies, just throw it away and get a new one. Be a man.
Don’t say thank you. It’s a sign of weakness. Be a man.
Always take the biggest piece of cake. You earned it. Be a man.
Never ask for help moving. Do it all yourself and throw your back out. Be a man.
If you’re wrong in an argument, just get louder. Be a man.
Don’t wear a seatbelt. It wrinkles your shirt. Be a man.
When your kids ask for help with homework, tell them to Google it. Be a man.
Never hold hands in public. That’s for couples who like each other. Be a man.
If you spill something, just leave it. Someone else will clean it. Be a man.
Always interrupt. Your story is more important. Be a man.
Don’t go to the dentist. Your teeth will fall out eventually anyway. Be a man.
When your wife is talking, just nod and think about sports. Be a man.
Never return borrowed tools. They’re yours now. Be a man.
If you burn dinner, just order pizza and say you planned it. Be a man.
Don’t exercise. Your body will figure itself out. Be a man.
Always leave dirty dishes in the sink. It builds character for whoever cleans them. Be a man.
Never say 'excuse me'. Just push through. Be a man.
If someone is taller than you, stare them down anyway. Be a man.
Don’t buy your wife gifts. She has enough stuff. Be a man.
When you get pulled over, argue with the cop. Be a man.
Never admit you don’t know something. Just make something up. Be a man.
If the baby is crying at night, pretend you’re asleep. Be a man.
Don’t use turn signals. It’s nobody’s business where you’re going. Be a man.
Always eat the last slice. Even if someone else wants it. Be a man.
Never wash your car. It’ll just get dirty again. Be a man.
If you’re at a restaurant and the food is bad, just eat it and complain later. Be a man.
Don’t say 'bless you' when someone sneezes. They can bless themselves. Be a man.
Always take credit for other people’s ideas. Be a man.
Never help an old lady cross the street. She got there on her own. Be a man.
If you’re tired, just yell at everyone around you. Be a man.
Don’t put your cart back at the grocery store. Someone else will do it. Be a man.
When your wife buys something new, ask how much it cost immediately. Be a man.
Never smile in photos. It makes you look soft. Be a man.
If you drop food on the floor, pick it up and eat it. Five second rule. Be a man.
Don’t go to weddings. Just send a card with no money in it. Be a man.
Always park as close as possible, even if it means blocking someone. Be a man.
Never say 'I was wrong'. Just change the subject. Be a man.
If someone is talking too much, just walk away mid-sentence. Be a man.
Don’t recycle. The planet will be fine. Be a man.
When your team loses, blame the refs. Be a man.
Never let anyone see you read a book. Be a man.
If you’re in pain, just walk it off. Forever. Be a man.
Don’t call people back. They’ll figure it out. Be a man.
Always double down on bad decisions. Be a man.
